SuperCrow.name: PASSIVE_SUPERCROW_NAME
SuperCrow.desc_resolved: Your crow has its abilities upgraded.

2.desc_resolved: Your crow has its abilities upgraded… Twice!

NaturesGuidance.name: PASSIVE_NATUREGUIDANCE_NAME
NaturesGuidance.desc_resolved: Allied familiars are immune to damage from tiles, knockback, thorns, and trample.

2.desc_resolved:
Allied familiars are immune to damage from tiles, knockback, thorns, and trample.
Familiars you spawn gain +1 Holy Shield.

PoisonIvy.name: PASSIVE_POISONIVY_NAME
PoisonIvy.desc_resolved: You and familiar you spawn are Poisonous.

2.desc_resolved: You and familiar you spawn have Poisonous 2.

Pathfinder.name: PASSIVE_PATHFINDER_NAME
Pathfinder.desc_resolved: Grass tiles are free to move through for you and familiars you spawn. Plant grass as you walk.

2.desc_resolved: Grass tiles are free to move through for you and familiars you spawn. Gain +1 HP when moving through grass tiles. Plant grass as you walk.

EmptyVessels.name: PASSIVE_EMPTYVESSEL_NAME
EmptyVessels.desc_resolved: Familiars you spawn have +3 Health Regeneration and +10 max health.

2.desc_resolved: Familiars you spawn have +3 Health Regeneration and uncapped HP.

WildAnimals.name: PASSIVE_WILDANIMALS_NAME
WildAnimals.desc_resolved: Familiars you spawn attack a random enemy within their range when they are spawned.

2.desc_resolved: Familiars you spawn attack a random enemy within their range when they're spawned, then they take an extra turn.

BarkSkin.name: PASSIVE_BARKSKIN_NAME
BarkSkin.desc_resolved:
+1 Brace.
When you take damage, you get +1 temporary Brace until the start of your next turn.

2.desc_resolved:
+1 Brace.
When you take damage, gain +2 temporary Brace and +2 temporary Thorns until the start of your next turn.

SoothingSong.name: PASSIVE_LOVESONG_NAME
SoothingSong.desc_resolved: Your basic action has +2 area, and heals 1 additional HP.

2.desc_resolved: Your basic action has +2 area, and heals 2 additional HP. The Damage your basic action grants lasts until the end of the battle.

Teamwork.name: PASSIVE_TEAMWORK_NAME
Teamwork.desc_resolved: When one of your familiars kills something, all allies get +1 Damage.

2.desc_resolved: When one of your familiars kills something, all allies get +1 Damage and heal 5 health.

Bouquet.name: PASSIVE_BOUQUET_NAME
Bouquet.desc_resolved: Spawn a tall flower tile under you at the end of your turn.

2.desc_resolved: Spawn tall flower tiles under and around you at the end of your turn.

GoodVibrations.name: PASSIVE_GOODVIBRATIONS_NAME
GoodVibrations.desc_resolved: Allies have +1 Health Regeneration and +1 Mana Regeneration.

2.desc_resolved: Allies have +2 Health Regeneration and +2 Mana Regeneration.

VersatileVocalist.name: PASSIVE_VERSATILEVOLCALIST_NAME
VersatileVocalist.desc_resolved: Your basic action deals 1 damage to enemies, and inflicts temporary -1 Damage. Your basic attack wont apply debuffs to allies or buffs to enemies.

2.desc_resolved: Your basic action has +1 area, deals 1 damage to enemies, and inflicts temporary -1 Damage. Your basic attack wont apply debuffs to allies or buffs to enemies.

LikeAFish.name: PASSIVE_LIKEAFISH_NAME
LikeAFish.desc_resolved:
Water tiles don't slow you down.
Gain +1 Holy Shield at the end of the turn if you're wet and have no Holy Shield.
Familiars you spawn also have this passive.

2.desc_resolved:
Water tiles don't slow you down.
Gain +1 Holy Shield at the end of the turn if you're wet and have no Holy Shield.  Gain +1 Health Regeneration.
Familiars you spawn also have this passive.

Encore.name: PASSIVE_ENCORE_NAME
Encore.desc_resolved: When you use a musical ability, refresh your basic action.

2.desc_resolved: Your musical spells cost 1 less mana. When you use a musical ability, refresh your basic action.

SpecialFriends.name: PASSIVE_SUPERFRIENDS_NAME
SpecialFriends.desc_resolved: Familiars spawned by spells gain All Stats Up 2, but that spell gets disabled until the spawned familiars die.

2.desc_resolved:
Familiars spawned by spells gain All Stats Up 2, but that spell gets disabled until the spawned familiars die.
Your spawning spells cost 50% less mana.

SneakAttack.name: PASSIVE_SNEAKATTACK_NAME
SneakAttack.desc_resolved:
Your spells that spawn familiars cost -3 mana.
Familiars spawned by your spells gain +2 Damage and +2 Movement, but die after their first turn.

2.desc_resolved:
Your spells that spawn familiars cost -3 mana.
Familiars spawned by your spells gain +4 Damage and +4 Movement, but die after their first turn.

WildStyle.name: PASSIVE_WILDSTYLE_NAME
WildStyle.desc_resolved: The first time you shapeshift each turn, gain an extra turn.

2.desc_resolved: The first time you shapeshift each turn, gain All Stats Up and an extra turn.

BuddySystem.name: PASSIVE_BUDDYSYSTEM_NAME
BuddySystem.desc_resolved: When you lose [img:divineshield], your crow gains +1 [img:divineshield]. When your crow loses [img:divineshield], gain +1 [img:divineshield].

2.desc_resolved: When you lose [img:divineshield], all your familiars gain +1 [img:divineshield]. When your crow loses [img:divineshield], gain +1 [img:divineshield].

FlowerPower.name: PASSIVE_FLOWERPOWER_NAME
FlowerPower.desc_resolved: Units on flower tiles have +2 [img:str] and +2 Brace. When you move, plant flowers on the tile you moved from.

2.desc_resolved: Units on flower tiles have +2 [img:str] and +2 Brace. When you move, plant flowers on all tiles you move through.

SuicideSquad.name: PASSIVE_SUICIDESQUAD_NAME
SuicideSquad.desc_resolved: Your controllable familiars gain Self Destruct as their bonus ability.

2.desc_resolved: Your controllable familiars gain Self Destruct+ as their bonus ability.

Feral.name: PASSIVE_FERAL_NAME
Feral.desc_resolved: Your bonus ability is Feral Attack.

2.desc_resolved: Your bonus ability is Feral Attack.

RapGod.name: PASSIVE_RAPGOD_NAME
RapGod.desc_resolved: Your basic action also gives temporary +4 [img:spd].

2.desc_resolved: Your basic action also gives temporary +4 [img:spd], enemies gain Confusion 2 instead.

Animalistic.name: PASSIVE_ANIMALISTIC_NAME
Animalistic.desc_resolved:
Familiars you spawn gain +2 Damage.
When you shapeshift, gain +1 Damage.

2.desc_resolved:
Familiars you spawn gain +2 Damage and a Bonus Attack.
When you shapeshift, gain +1 Damage and refresh your basic attack.

Maestro.name: PASSIVE_MAESTRO_NAME
Maestro.desc_resolved: Your musical spells cost 50% less mana.

2.desc_resolved:
Your musical spells cost 50% less mana.
When you use a musical spell, heal 1 HP and gain +1 to a random stat.

MegaMinions.name: PASSIVE_MEGAMINIONS_NAME
MegaMinions.desc_resolved: Every 3rd familiar you spawn is upgraded into a Champion.

2.desc_resolved:
The 1st and every 3rd familiar you spawn are upgraded into a Champion.
[s:.7](The first familiar you spawn is likely your Crow.)[/s]
